name: tiny-coerce
description: Convert strings to JavaScript types (boolean, null, number, object, array)

scripts.build: npm run lint && rm -rf dist && npm run rollup
scripts.fix: oxlint --fix *.js src tests && oxfmt *.js src tests/unit --write
scripts.lint: oxlint *.js src tests && oxfmt *.js src tests/unit --check
scripts.coverage: node --test --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-exclude=dist/** --test-coverage-exclude=tests/** --test-reporter=spec tests/**/*.js 2>&1 | grep -A 1000 "start of coverage report" > coverage.txt && ! grep -q "failing tests" coverage.txt

author: Jason Mulligan <jason.mulligan@avoidwork.com>
